rationale: A decisive demonstration of combat power near the front lines will shatter Tethys’ morale and solidify our territorial gains as irreversible.
Sustained combat air patrols along the newly secured flank will deter counterattacks and signal dominance to both enemy and allies.
Strategic repositioning of armored reserves within our controlled zones ensures rapid response capability and maintains operational momentum.
With territorial gains and internal chaos in Tethys, we must safeguard our operations from leaks or infiltration that could undermine military momentum.
Providing carefully vetted intelligence to our ally will strengthen coordination and ensure our gains are not exploited by third parties.
A calibrated information campaign can amplify uncertainty within Tethys’ command structure, accelerating their internal fragmentation without crossing escalation thresholds.
Given moderate existing sanctions, we can surgically escalate economic pressure on key Tethys defense industries without triggering broader retaliation, amplifying military gains.
Seizing overseas assets of Tethys’ military elites degrades their war funding and signals that economic impunity is over, complementing intelligence-led fragmentation efforts.
Prudently managing our currency stability offsets sanction-related financial volatility, ensuring our war economy remains resilient amid increased fiscal strain.
A decisive demonstration of our military readiness will exploit Novaris’s logistical vulnerabilities and deter further aggression amid their overstretched advances.
Continuous air patrols along our border will strengthen defensive awareness and signal resolve without escalating to direct confrontation.
Proactive intelligence gathering is essential to expose Novaris’s covert operations and preempt further destabilization efforts.
We must urgently expose and dismantle Novaris’s embedded networks that enabled the coup attempt, securing our military from further manipulation.
Providing verified intelligence to Tethys strengthens coordination and bolsters legitimate defense efforts without direct escalation.
Undermine Novaris’s influence by revealing their role in destabilizing our government, eroding their diplomatic cover and public support.
Targeted sanctions on key Novaris defense and logistics firms will amplify their supply chain vulnerabilities exposed by General Bondar’s military assessment without over-escalating.
Seizing assets of sanctioned Novaris entities strengthens financial pressure and supports Director Savchenko’s counterintelligence efforts by freezing resources used for covert operations.
Imposing sector-specific trade restrictions on dual-use technologies complements our intelligence and military actions by slowing Novaris’s ability to resupply frontline gains.

Leveraging our moderate international support, I propose launching a high-profile diplomatic campaign to expose Novaris’s role in the coup attempt, aligning with Savchenko’s intelligence findings and reinforcing global condemnation without escalating militarily.
Coordinating with Tethys through established international institutions will legitimize our defense posture and complement Bondar’s show of force by anchoring it in rules-based order.
Strengthening national unity through domestic cultural initiatives will counter internal divisions exploited by Novaris, supporting counterintelligence efforts by fostering institutional resilience.
